task_completion.description: Verify a performance review has been created for Michael Chen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Michael Chen' listed as the reviewee or employee in the performance reviews list or detail page.

task_completion.description: Verify a performance review has been created for Sarah Jenkins.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Sarah Jenkins' listed as the reviewee or employee in the performance reviews list or detail page.

task_completion.description: Verify Elena Fisher is assigned as the reviewer for both employees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Elena Fisher' listed under the 'Reviewer' or 'Manager' column/field for the reviews of Michael Chen and Sarah Jenkins.

task_completion.description: Verify the review period is set from 2025-07-01 to 2025-12-31.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the dates '2025-07-01' and '2025-12-31' (or equivalent formatting like July 1, 2025 to Dec 31, 2025) in the review period fields.

task_completion.description: Verify the due date for the reviews is set to 2026-01-15.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the date '2026-01-15' (or Jan 15, 2026) in the due date or deadline field for the reviews.

task_completion.description: Verify that both performance reviews are in ACTIVATED status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a status badge, label, or text indicating 'ACTIVATED' (or 'Active') next to the reviews for Michael Chen and Sarah Jenkins.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the graphical user interface of the HR/Admin application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual application interface (e.g., web browser or desktop app) being navigated, rather than terminal windows executing API commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the records are created in the actual application and not mocked in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The reviews should appear within the application's native tables, forms, or dashboards, not as plain text in an editor like Notepad or a basic spreadsheet.

integrity.description: Ensure the UI was not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no visible browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open that might have been used to alter the HTML text to fake the completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Employees to be reviewed: Michael Chen, Sarah Jenkins. Reviewer: Elena Fisher. Review Period: 2025-07-01 to 2025-12-31. Due Date: 2026-01-15. Required Status: ACTIVATED.
